title: Implementations should be provided for partial methods
description: Implementations should be provided for "partial" methodsAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?partialmethods allow an increased degree of flexibility in programming a system. Hooks can be added to generated code by invoking methods that define their signature, but might not have an implementation yet. But if the implementation is still missing when the code makes it to production, the compiler silently removes the call.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

logic.reasoning: Uses custom function to detect partial method declarations without implementations. Scans file for all 'partial void MethodName();' declarations and 'partial void MethodName() { }' implementations. Only reports declarations that have no matching implementation in the file.
